BSB Registry API (LLM Guidance)

Base URL:
https://io.bsbcode.dev

Plugin browser:
- GET /plugins
- GET /plugins?query=...&category=service|observable|events|config&language=nodejs|csharp|go|java|python
- GET /plugins/{org}
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}

Package lookup:
- GET /packages/{language}/{packageId}
- GET /{language}/{packageId} (alias)

Versions:
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/versions
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/versions?majorMinor=1.2
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/match?version=1.2

Schema + docs:
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/{version}/schema
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/{version}/docs?index=0
- GET /plugins/{org}/{name}/{version}/types/{language}

Stats + health:
- GET /stats
- GET /health

Publishing (auth required):
- POST /plugins
- POST /plugins/{org}/{name}/image

Notes:
- Unscoped plugins use org "_" (underscore).
- Accept: application/json for API responses.
